agents/openai.yaml.purpose: Platform UI metadata. It is intentionally absent when no platform-specific presentation is maintained.

README.md.purpose: Repository-facing supplemental documentation. Runtime skill loading depends on SKILL.md, not README.md.

scripts/validate_scenarios.py.purpose: Legacy per-skill scenario validation. Collection-wide static and behavioral runners are authoritative.

evals/fixture-assertions.json.purpose: Only skills with inert fixture assertions need this static-eval input; behavioral safety coverage is required for every skill.
